note: Claude fills these from news + live quotes. live_trader.py / signal_sim.py trade any signal with direction in (bullish,bearish), confidence >= 0.6, already_priced_in == false, not expired (valid_for >= today NY), and no open position. THREE hard guards protect the open: (1) signal expires after valid_for -> must be refreshed pre-open, so a stale signal never fires; (2) NO-CHASE: skip if the name already ran > max_chase_3d_pct in our direction; (3) REGIME guard: skip new longs if the broad market (SPY) is down more than regime_max_drop_pct on the day (a risk-off / sudden-crash open — the Korea/DeepSeek lesson), and skip new shorts on a symmetric rip. A premarket routine re-checks the latest news and rewrites this file before the open, so the decision always uses pre-open info, not yesterday's.
data_quality_flags: 2026-07-18 quotes.json shows VLO +29%, MPC +27.8%, PSX +23.7% single-day — implausible for large refiners, treat as bad data; do NOT build signals on VLO/MPC/PSX until verified. XOM/CVX/OXY/XLE quotes look clean.

invalidate_if.ceasefire_or_deescalation: If the weekend/premarket brings an Iran ceasefire or de-escalation, the oil premium collapses — flip already_priced_in=true and do NOT enter.
invalidate_if.broad_risk_off: If SPY is down > regime_max_drop_pct at the open, the REGIME guard blocks entry automatically.

scenarios.trigger: Hormuz disruption persists, WTI holds > $80, energy keeps leading the rotation out of semis
oil consolidates at a high level, XOM chops sideways near Friday's close
weekend ceasefire / de-escalation collapses the oil premium; energy gives back the spike

key_risks: event-driven: a sudden ceasefire reverses oil violently — REQUIRES a pre-open news recheck
broad risk-off from the semiconductor bear market (Nasdaq -1.81% Fri) could drag everything down at the open
XOM already +4.7% Friday — buying strength; 3d change still under the no-chase threshold so entry is allowed, but keep the 2% stop tight
signals.reasoning: 板块轮动:资金撤出芯片/科技(费半进入熊市,AI 资本开支恐慌,奈飞财报暴跌 -11%),涌入能源。周五霍尔木兹停火破裂、伊朗袭击科威特电厂、美国空袭伊朗,Brent ~$88 / WTI ~$82,油价一周 +12% —— 这是**新的**催化剂,不是旧的已 price-in 溢价。XOM 是最干净、最流动的原油受益标的。但这是事件驱动,停火即反转 —— 所以 requires_preopen_recheck:true,开盘前必须用最新新闻复核;若周末停火/降级就翻成 already_priced_in=true 不进场。
